underlying_goal: # Context from my IDE setup: ## Active file: docs.json ## Open tabs: - docs.json: docs.json - contributing.mdx: docs-guide/contributing.mdx - source-of-truth-policy.md: docs-guide/source-of-truth-policy.md - scripts-index.md: docs-guide/...
friction_detail: Session hit context compaction, which means some earlier history was summarized away. User messages contained explicit frustration, which usually points to trust or convergence issues. Session ran from a workspace-path variant, which increases thread fragmentation risk.
brief_summary: [DONE] Restructure docs-guide paths. **Findings (Gitignore Audit)** 1. `P1`: Generated report churn is not ignored, so routine test/audit runs keep modifying tracked files. Evidence: 73 tracked files under `tasks/reports/**` and `tests/reports/**`, while `.gitignore` only igno...
